1452006397809000601.content: *squeak* Of course, I'll repeat the song for you! Just like a seal would show you its favorite dance move, here it goes again! *blub* Here's the song repeating, hop to

[2026-03-08 21:33:04] lordofnobles: Mistä alkaisin, jos susta kertoisin?
Where would I begin if I were to tell about you?

Joku toinen kertois kai kauniimmin
Someone else would probably tell it more beautifully

Mut joka askel, jonka otat poispäin musta
But every step you take away from me

On kuin kehostaan ois irti, mieli huutaa silti
Feels like being torn out of my own body, yet my mind still screams

Voiko tunne tää elää meitä pidempään?
Can this feeling live longer than we do?

Mut eihän siihen kukaan anna vastausta
But no one gives an answer to that

Hei rakas kerro mulle
Hey my love, tell me

Mikä on tää tunne
What is this feeling

Kun ei tunnu jaloissani maa
When I can’t feel the ground beneath my feet

Voisin tehdä laulun kauniin
I could make a beautiful song

Tai kodistani valmiin
Or make my home complete

Mut ilman sua, ne ois seiniä vaan
But without you, they would only be walls

Hei rakas kerro mulle
Hey my love, tell me

Mikä on tää tunne
What is this feeling

Kun ei riitä Linnunratakaan
When even the Milky Way isn’t enough

Voisin tehdä kodin kauniin
I could make a beautiful home

Tai laulustani valmiin
Or finish my song

Mut ilman sua, ne ois sointuja vaan
But without you, they would only be chords

Jos nähdään samaa unta, niin onko se ees unta?
If we see the same dream, is it even a dream?

Jos samaan aikaan samat sanat sanotaan
If we say the same words at the same time

Niin puhutaanko silloin siitä kohtalosta?
Are we then talking about destiny?

Jota kyynisesti mietin, mut tavallaan mä tiesin
Something I thought about cynically, yet somehow I knew

Että maailman kaunein päivä on se kun
That the most beautiful day in the world is the day when

Sä jostain pohjan alta pois mut nostat
You lift me up from somewhere deep beneath the bottom
